download_instructions: Go to https://www.furmancenter.org/data-tools-resources/data-tools-data-downloads/, scroll to Full Neighborhood Indicators Downloads, download the Excel workbook named Neighborhood_Indicators_CoreDataDownload_yyyy-mm-dd.xlsx, and place it in data_raw/furman_coredata_neighborhood_indicators/current/.
notes: Use only for validation and descriptive comparison.
